message: Cash expense exceeds Rs.10,000 per day — potential disallowance under Section 40A(3) ITA 1961
Cash transaction of Rs.2 Lakh or more — penalty risk under Section 269ST ITA 1961
Transaction exceeds Rs.50 Lakh — ensure proper documentation and board approval

condition: amount >= 30000 and sub_category in ['Professional Fees', 'Legal & Professional', 'Audit Fees']
message: Professional fee payment subject to TDS at 10% under Section 194J
Contractor payment above threshold — TDS at 2% applicable under Section 194C

condition: sub_category in ['Staff Welfare Expenses', 'Food & Beverages', 'Vehicle Repair', 'Health Insurance']
message: Expense category has blocked Input Tax Credit under Section 17(5) of CGST Act 2017
High income transaction — verify advance tax installments are on schedule per Section 208
